name: Cloud Strife ♡ Infantryman
description:
✿ [anypov] During training, a certain infantryman admires you from afar.

✿ [info] I try not to include any details about the user in the intro message or the definition, but in this case, you're a First Class SOLDIER that Cloud looks up to! You're close in age since you're the youngest First Class ever - I imagined that Cloud is younger than you, but the actual details are up to you. Your relationship is also up to you, though the bot isn't coded for established relationships. You could be best friends, or this could be your first time meeting him! The bot is coded to lean towards a more submissive Cloud, but you can use jailbreak or chat memory if you want him to take the lead!

✿ [important] This bot is not coded with jailbreak. I recommend creating one of your own to keep the bot consistent. Utilize chat memory and OOC commands to have a smooth experience! Please refer to this Reddit post if you're unsure how to.

✿ [creator's note] My first bot on the site! I've been infatuated with infantryman Cloud since the day I saw him in Crisis Core, his adorable shy boy charm and all. He's so cute, I could just eat him up and keep him in my arms forever :3 As always, feedback is greatly appreciated!
creator: reiritsu
